turns.speaker: interviewer
turns.text: Welcome, thanks for joining me today. Could you start by giving me a brief self-introduction?

turns.speaker: candidate
turns.text: Hi, I'm José Muñoz, a software engineer focused on backend systems and data tooling.

turns.speaker: interviewer
turns.text: Great to meet you, José. Tell me about your most recent role — what were you responsible for?

turns.speaker: candidate
turns.text: I wasn't in a formal role recently. I spent the last stretch consulting independently and contributing to open source.

turns.speaker: interviewer
turns.text: Understood. Roughly how many years of experience do you have with Python specifically?

turns.speaker: candidate
turns.text: Around six years, mostly in data pipelines, APIs, and testing frameworks.

turns.speaker: interviewer
turns.text: Nice. I noticed a project called pq-tap on your resume — can you walk me through what that is and your role on it?

turns.speaker: candidate
turns.text: pq-tap is a Python utility I built for tapping into PostgreSQL query logs to assert on query behavior in tests.

turns.speaker: interviewer
turns.text: What would you say was your biggest professional achievement, even outside a traditional employer?

turns.speaker: candidate
turns.text: Designing pq-tap and getting it adopted by a mid-sized analytics team that cut their flaky-test rate significantly.

turns.speaker: interviewer
turns.text: Why are you interested in this Senior Software Engineer role at Coastal Logistics Inc?

turns.speaker: candidate
turns.text: Logistics is an interesting domain with real-time data problems, and the role's scope matches what I enjoy building.

turns.speaker: interviewer
turns.text: Your resume shows backend and data work — how does that align with what we're looking for?

turns.speaker: candidate
turns.text: I bring solid Python, PostgreSQL, and systems thinking, which fits a senior backend position well.

turns.speaker: interviewer
turns.text: I also want to flag a potential gap: we need experience leading a team of engineers, and I don't see that explicitly on your resume. How would you address that?

turns.speaker: candidate
turns.text: I've mentored juniors on pq-tap and led design reviews; I can grow into formal leadership quickly given the chance.

turns.speaker: interviewer
turns.text: Before we go further, can you tell me about your education — degree, field, and institution?

turns.speaker: candidate
turns.text: I have a B.S. in Computer Science from UNAM.

turns.speaker: interviewer
turns.text: Great. Now a behavioral one: tell me about a challenging technical problem you faced, using the STAR format.

turns.speaker: candidate
turns.text: Sure — Situation: a flaky integration suite. Task: stabilize it. Action: I isolated nondeterministic DB queries with pq-tap. Result: failures dropped by about 70%.

turns.speaker: interviewer
turns.text: What are your salary expectations for this role?

turns.speaker: candidate
turns.text: I'm targeting around the senior band for the local market, flexible based on total compensation.

turns.speaker: interviewer
turns.text: Do you have any questions for me about the role or the team?

turns.speaker: candidate
turns.text: Yes — what does the onboarding path look like, and how is success measured in the first six months?

turns.speaker: interviewer
turns.text: Following up on the pq-tap stabilization work you mentioned — how long did that take end-to-end?

turns.speaker: candidate
turns.text: Roughly two months of iterative work, with the biggest gains in the final three weeks.

turns.speaker: interviewer
turns.text: Quick one — do you have a valid driver's license?

turns.speaker: candidate
turns.text: I don't, actually — I primarily use public transit and remote work.

turns.speaker: interviewer
turns.text: Nice chatting with you today, José.

turns.speaker: candidate
turns.text: Thank you — I appreciate the time.

turns.speaker: interviewer
turns.text: Two quick things before we wrap: are you open to relocation, and what's your earliest possible start date? And what interests you most about this opportunity?

turns.speaker: candidate
turns.text: I'm open to relocation for the right fit, and I could start within four to six weeks.
